title: Gaming Retail E-commerce Platform
summary: Built a custom e-commerce platform for a gaming retailer, integrated with an external gaming database and an intelligent, context-aware search that helps shoppers find the right title even without an exact search term, plus smart product recommendations.
results: Easier product discovery for customers browsing by platform, franchise, or genre, not just exact titles.
More relevant search results and product recommendations.
Reduced shopper frustration and abandonment, supporting stronger sales conversions.
